PRP TherapyAventura, FL

Harness your body's natural healing power for skin rejuvenation, hair restoration, and collagen boost.

Duration

45–60 min

Downtime

1–2 days redness

Results

4–6 weeks progressive

Sessions

3–4 sessions

About PRP Therapy in Aventura, FL

Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) therapy uses your body's own growth factors to stimulate healing and regeneration. We draw a small amount of your blood, process it to concentrate the platelets, and then apply the PRP to target areas. This natural approach stimulates collagen production, accelerates healing, and promotes cellular renewal — making it ideal for facial rejuvenation, hair restoration, and enhancing other treatments.

Key Benefits

100% natural — uses your own blood
Stimulates collagen and elastin production
Improves skin texture and tone
Promotes hair regrowth
Enhances results of other treatments
Minimal risk of allergic reaction

Treatment Areas

Full Face (Vampire Facial)Scalp (Hair Restoration)Under EyesNeck & DécolletageHands

Frequently Asked Questions

The Process

The PRP Process

A natural approach to rejuvenation using your body's own healing power

1

1. Blood Draw

A small amount of blood is drawn from your arm — similar to a routine blood test.

2

2. Centrifuge Processing

Your blood is placed in a centrifuge that separates the platelet-rich plasma from other blood components.

3

3. PRP Activation

The concentrated PRP — rich in growth factors — is prepared for application to your treatment area.

4

4. Application

PRP is applied via micro-needling (Vampire Facial) or injected directly into the scalp for hair restoration.

5

5. Regeneration

Growth factors stimulate collagen production and cellular renewal over the following weeks and months.
